page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.u2i family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.7 GHz, configured with 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, resulting in 1.0 thread per core. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include bundled local storage or integrated GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The instance does not feature complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is structured for compute-focused workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation without massive memory overhead. The lack of local storage requires external block storage attachment. It is suitable for batch processing, web serving, and distributed compute tasks that align with its 10 Gbps network baseline and dedicated Intel Xeon cores.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.4xlarge is an x86_64 compute-oriented server instance powered by a 2.7 GHz Intel Xeon processor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The hardware profile includes 32.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB per core memory allocation, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Its resource distribution makes it highly suitable for compute-intensive workloads, batch processing, and web serving applications that require dedicated CPU execution without the need for high memory-to-CPU ratios or local storage.

tagline: A dedicated Intel Xeon compute instance featuring sixteen vCPUs, thirty-two gigabytes of RAM, and ten gigabits per second network bandwidth.
